PresentationMode coverage 22→64 (was lowest test:src ratio at 0.53 of unaudited components): added 42 tests. Replicated swipe-gesture detector (>50px horizontal, 1.5× horizontal-dominant, <500ms — pure function with all 4 boundary types tested), index clamping invariants (initial Math.max+Math.min, total-changes effect re-clamp, safeIndex one-frame-flicker mitigation, return-null when total=0, goNext/goPrev clamp at boundaries), direction state machine ('right' on next, 'left' on prev, passed as `custom` to AnimatePresence), onNodeFocus depending on currentId STRING (not object reference — avoids re-firing on render), progress percentage formula (((index+1)/total)*100), boundary disabled state (opacity-20 + cursor-default at index===0 / index===total-1), body+html scroll-lock symmetry (captures both prev values, restores both — not hardcoded 'auto'), card content rendering (definition fallback 'Sin definición disponible', annotation in italic quotes, conditional flashcard/quiz counts, type badge for non-keyword nodes, mastery clamped to >=0 with Math.round, aria-valuemin=0/max=100, Georgia serif mandatory), AnimatePresence config (mode='wait' for full-exit, key=current.id remount, 0.25s easeInOut), bilingual bottom hint (desktop arrows + Escape vs mobile tap arrows), brand-dark backdrop rgba(27,59,54,0.92). Result: 74 files / 2828 tests, ALL PASSING. Phase 2/3/4 audits unchanged.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2828/2828 assertions pass; PresentationMode swipe-gesture and index-clamp invariants pinned; coverage saturation continues — last 11 cycles found 0 new bugs
